Index.meta_title: Luster — Free booking and CRM for nail techs
Index.meta_description: Free booking, client management, Google Calendar sync, and growth tools built for nail professionals.

Hero.title: A polished booking workspace <important>built for nail techs</important>.
Hero.description: Manage bookings, clients, services, and Google Calendar from one simple Luster workspace.

Features.section_title: Everything a nail tech needs to stay booked
Features.section_description: Luster keeps appointments, client details, services, and availability together.
Features.feature_description: Simple salon tools designed around a nail tech's actual day.

Pricing.section_title: Free booking tools for independent nail techs
Pricing.section_description: Run your bookings and client workspace free. Optional text messaging is paid directly through the salon's connected provider.

FAQ.question: What is included with Luster?
FAQ.answer: Every invited nail tech gets online booking, client management, services, scheduling, and optional Google Calendar connection in one owner workspace.

CTA.title: Ready for a more polished booking day?
CTA.description: Sign in to manage your Luster salon workspace.

ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to perform this action

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Dashboard.meta_description: Manage your salon bookings, clients, services, and integrations.

DashboardIndex.title_bar_description: Manage your salon from one place
DashboardIndex.message_state_description: Open your Luster workspace to manage appointments, clients, services, and integrations.
DashboardIndex.message_state_alternative: Need help? Contact Luster support at <url></url>.

Billing.current_section_description: Adjust your payment plan to best suit your requirements

TodoForm.message_description: Enter a detailed message for your todo.

Rewards.title: Rewards
Rewards.first_visit_message: Book your first visit to start earning rewards.

Invite.title: Invite & Earn
Invite.subtitle: Share the beauty, earn rewards
Invite.description: Invite your friends to experience our salon. When they book their first appointment, you both get rewarded!
